overall.description: A nighttime scene from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character in western attire walking through a forested wilderness area while leading a black and white horse. The character carries a lantern that casts a warm pool of light on the dirt path ahead, contrasting with the cool moonlit surroundings. The clip depicts steady movement along the trail followed by a brief pause.

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a dirt forest path at night, leading a black and white horse. A lantern illuminates the ground ahead, revealing pine trees and rocky terrain on either side. The camera follows from behind as they progress through the quiet wilderness, with the horse maintaining pace beside the character.

events.description: character stops walking and stands still next to the horse, looking ahead into the darkness

agents.ego_description: character halts on the path and stands beside the stationary horse, appearing to observe the surroundings ahead

notable_agents.action: horse stops and stands still beside the character, facing forward with ears perked

entered.detail: distant rocky formation visible ahead on the path

segments.scene_description: The character comes to a halt on the forest path, standing next to the stationary horse. The lantern continues to cast light on the surrounding grass and rocks as they pause in the darkness, with a rocky outcrop visible in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit forest that transitions from a steady journey to a sudden, quiet halt. It begins by trailing behind a character in western attire as they lead a black and white horse along a dirt path, with a lantern casting a warm glow on the pine trees and rocky terrain. As the pair progresses through the wilderness, the camera maintains its position, capturing the rhythmic movement of the horse beside the character. The scene then shifts as the character comes to a complete stop, bringing the horse to a standstill on the trail. Finally, the camera lingers on the stationary pair, with the lantern light illuminating the surrounding grass and rocks while revealing a distant rocky outcrop ahead in the darkness.
